app_store.name: NOMAD - AI Travel Planner
app_store.subtitle: AI-Powered Trip Itineraries
app_store.description_short: Generate AI-powered travel itineraries in seconds. Plan trips, discover local secrets, and navigate offline.
app_store.description_full:
NOMAD is your AI travel companion. Tell us where you're going, your budget, and travel style — we'll create the perfect itinerary in seconds.

FEATURES:
✨ AI Route Generation — Custom itineraries based on your preferences
📍 Smart Compass — Find nearby attractions and navigate with ease
📅 Day-by-Day View — Beautiful timeline with activity tracking
💾 Offline Access — Save routes locally, no internet needed
🛡️ Language Shield — Offline phrasebook for 50+ languages
💰 Budget Tracking — Budget, Moderate, or Luxury modes

PERFECT FOR:
• Solo travelers
• Couples planning romantic getaways
• Food explorers and foodies
• Adventure seekers
• Digital nomads

SUBSCRIPTION:
NOMAD Pro ($9.99/month) unlocks unlimited AI generations, offline maps, and priority support. Free tier includes 3 AI trips per month.

Download NOMAD and let AI plan your next adventure.

google_play.title: NOMAD - AI Travel Planner
google_play.short_description: AI-powered travel itineraries with offline support
google_play.full_description:
NOMAD is your AI travel companion. Generate personalized trip itineraries in seconds based on your destination, budget, and travel style.

✨ AI Route Generation
📍 Smart Compass Navigation
📅 Day-by-Day Itinerary View
💾 Offline Route Access
🛡️ Language Shield (50+ languages)
💰 Budget, Moderate & Luxury Modes

Free: 3 AI trips/month
Pro ($9.99/month): Unlimited AI, offline maps, priority support
